passage.title: A Day with Had To / Will Have To
passage.text: I had to go to office yesterday. I will have to go to office tomorrow. He had to complete this work. He will have to complete this work. We had to follow the rules. We will have to follow the rules. She had to wake up early every day. She will have to wake up early every day. Did you have to do this? Will you have to do this?
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे कल ऑफिस जाना पड़ा। मुझे कल ऑफिस जाना पड़ेगा। उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ा। उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ेगा। हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ा। हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ेगा। उसे रोज़ जल्दी उठना पड़ा। उसे रोज़ जल्दी उठना पड़ेगा। क्या तुम्हें यह करना पड़ा? क्या तुम्हें यह करना पड़ेगा?
